title: Senior Data Analyst (eSports)
content:
We are looking for a Senior Data Analyst for our products in the eSports industry.

Location: all over the world.

Team: Senior Data Analyst, BI Analyst.

Who will the candidate directly interact with: Head of Analytics.

Requirements:

5+ years of experience in Data Analytics / Business Intelligence with large-scale datasets.

Advanced hands-on experience with SQL, ClickHouse, and relational databases.

Strong experience building and optimizing dashboards and reports in Tableau.

Experience delivering end-to-end analytics solutions and translating data into actionable business insights.

Experience ensuring data quality, consistency, and governance standards.

Experience owning analytics for a project or business unit.

Experience in gaming, eSports, or high-load transactional environments is preferred.

English- sufficient for professional communication and documentation.

Ukrainian or Russian — Upper-Intermediate+ / Advanced (for internal communication).

Required education/Training background:

Strong academic foundation in databases and SQL, statistics and probability, data analysis and modeling, and information systems architecture.

Will be an advantage:

Proven experience integrating, transforming, and migrating data across multiple systems (ETL/ELT).

List of technologies:

SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle).

ClickHouse.

ETL/ELT tools.

Responsibilities:

Take full ownership of analytics for a specific project or business unit.

Collect, clean, and transform data from multiple databases and sources.

Design, create, and maintain database tables, views, queries, and data models.

Integrate and migrate data across different systems and databases (ETL/ELT).

Build, maintain, and optimize dashboards and reports in Tableau.

Conduct in-depth data analysis and translate results into actionable business insights.

Ensure data quality, consistency, and governance across all datasets.

Key Deliverables:

High-quality dashboards and reports in Tableau.

Analytical research and insights that inform business decisions.

What we could offer:

24 days of paid leave per year.

100% paid sick leave.

Salary range: $2500-$5000 USD (depending on skills and experience).

Full-time remote.

Long-term collaboration.

Sustainable business.

Game and entertainment development company.

Stages:

HR interview (1 hour).

Test task.

Technical interview (1 hour).

title: Middle Data Analyst for Sport Team

With 1000+ GR8 people across locations and time zones, we don’t just ship technology — we help operators build success stories across brands, markets, and geos.

Our ambition drives us. Our people make it real.

If you’re a challenger in spirit and a champion in action — join us.

Why this role exists:

This role exists to drive data-informed decision-making within the Sportsbook product by uncovering growth and monetization opportunities through deep product analytics and experimentation. title: Platform Analytics Engineer
content:
Our Mission and Vision

At Solidgate, our mission is clear: to empower outstanding entrepreneurs to build exceptional internet companies. We exist to fuel the builders — the ones shaping the digital economy — with the financial infrastructure they deserve. To achieve that, we’re on a bold path: to become the #1 payments orchestration platform in the world.

We believe strong analytics infrastructure is not just support — it’s a core driver of product quality, reliability, and business growth.

About the Role

Solidgate is a product-driven FinTech company operating in a highly dynamic and regulated environment. Our platform processes millions of transactions daily, where data accuracy, real-time monitoring, and system reliability directly impact revenue and customer trust.

As we grow, we are expanding our Platform Analytics function and are looking for a Platform Analytics Engineer to help strengthen our analytics and monitoring infrastructure.

Platform Analytics at Solidgate is responsible for the analytical foundation of the platform — systems that monitor data quality, system health, anomalies, and critical business metrics in real time. This function ensures platform stability, supports operational decision-making, and enables teams to scale reliably.

This role sits at the intersection of engineering and data science, with a strong focus on platform enablement.

The mission is to evolve and support analytics infrastructure, including automations, monitoring systems and AI solutions, while continuously improving shared projects, tools, and guidelines used across the analytics team.

This is a hands-on role with ownership over meaningful parts of platform-level analytics systems, with mentorship and shared responsibility across the team.

You will work with Python-based data automations and observability systems, including anomaly, metrics, and real-time monitoring, designed to detect data inconsistencies, trend deviations, and operational issues.

Explore our technology stack ➡️ here.

What You Will Own

Short-term responsibilities:

Stabilizing and modernizing core monitoring services

Expanding and improving monitoring systems

Refactoring and restructuring automation projects for recurring tasks

Automating data source preparation and processing pipelines

Working closely with Amazon Redshift (DWH)

Long-term responsibilities:

Implementing AI agents to process and classify monitoring notifications as PoCs and gradually in production

Contributing to internal initiatives around AI-driven automation and scalable analytics systems

Gradually taking ownership of complex platform-level analytics initiatives

You Are a Great Fit If You Have

2–3 years of overall experience, including at least 1.5 years of Python in production

Strong Python fundamentals: PEP standards, versioning, basic OOP, functional programming

Experience with Airflow

Strong SQL skills, including window functions and query optimization

Experience working with production systems and legacy codebases

Responsibility, comfort operating production systems, prioritizing under ambiguity, and strong time-management skills

Nice to Have

Experience with BI tools

Familiarity with NoSQL databases

Interest in AI-driven automation

English level: Intermediate+

Git-based workflows and code review culture

Dependency management and packaging (pip/poetry)

CI/CD basics (GitHub Actions / GitLab CI)

Why Join Solidgate?

Build systems that matter. Your work will directly affect platform stability, business decisions, and customer trust.

Real ownership. You’ll work with critical infrastructure, not dashboards for dashboards’ sake.

Modern stack & innovation. Real-time analytics, AI automation, and scalable data systems.

Growth without bureaucracy. Fast decisions, strong engineering culture, and room to experiment.

The Extras: 30+ days off, unlimited sick leave, free office meals, health coverage, and Apple gear to keep you productive. Courses, conferences, sports and wellness benefits — all designed for ideas, focus, and fun.

Tomorrow’s fintech needs your mindset. Come build it with us.

title: Product Analyst
content:
We are looking for a sharp and detail-oriented Product Analyst with experience in the gambling industry to join our product team. You’ll work closely with product managers and cross-functional teams to turn player behavior data and product usage metrics into actionable insights. If you have a strong analytical mindset, a deep understanding of iGaming user flows, and experience driving product decisions through data — we’d love to hear from you.

HOW YOU WILL MAKE AN IMPACT:

Analysis of product metrics: Reg2Dep, retention, LTV, ARPU, conversion, engagement, etc.

Building and analyzing user funnels

Conducting A/B tests and evaluating their results

Analyzing player behavior and identifying anomalies

Supporting the business team with data and analytics for decision-making

Building dashboards for products

Participating in product roadmap development based on data

Monitoring the effectiveness of features and promotional activities

Monitor and control data accuracy, help build processes for collecting and storing data on transactions and user behavior

Identifying, evaluating, and implementing analytics tools to improve product data tracking and visibility

WHAT WILL HELP YOU SUCCEED IN THE ROLE:

At least 2 years of experience as a product analyst in the iGaming industry

Hands-on experience with analytical tools like SQL, Power BI, Excel.

Working with segmentation: identifying and analyzing user segments by game and payment patterns.

Identifying growth points: search and validation of product hypotheses based on data.

Understanding of the basics of web analytics and CRO (conversions, user journey).

Attention to detail, systematic thinking and ability to visualize data.

Excel skills at a high level (not just the ability to create pivot tables, but well-thought-out structuring and competent design).

Ability to set up goals, events and user segments in Google Analytics to monitor key user scenarios.

Skills in correlating data from product analytics and web analytics for a complete picture of user behavior.

Experience in setting up and analyzing user behavior funnels using Smartlook, Hotjar, Google Analytics (GA4) tools.

Mastery of methods of visual analysis of user sessions (session recordings, heatmaps, clickmaps) to identify UX problems and churn points.

Knowledge of Python or R for advanced data analysis will be a plus.

WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE:

Flexible working hours and a remote work setup, so you can plan work around your life and not your life around work!

Unlimited vacation days and paid sick leave—because your rest matters.

A competitive compensation that truly reflects your skills and expertise.

Employee referral bonus and gifts to celebrate your special occasions.

50% financial support for learning expenses to supercharge your professional growth!

A positive atmosphere where you always feel respected and truly belong.

Inspirational team-building activities that turn colleagues into best friends.

Wellness benefits: We’ll support your sports passions, from yoga classes to gym memberships.

Co-working space reimbursement to save your nerves from always working from home :)

title: Junior Deploy Engineer

Design, develop, and maintain advanced Power BI reports and dashboards

Work closely with Product Managers and Client Support Managers to manage the support queue and align with the product roadmap

title: Product Analyst
content:
The Product Analyst is a core member of the Product Design team, responsible for translating business needs, and system requirements into clearly defined design and technical execution documentation. This role is responsible for defining the logic, behavior, and detailed UI functionality of the app. Depending on the feature complexity, the Analyst either takes the lead in clarifying requirements from scratch or ensures the user interface aligns perfectly with backend technical specifications provided by System Analysts.

The purpose of the Product Analyst is to translate business needs into comprehensive, unambiguous UI Design Documents (UIDD). For complex features, this means honoring the "back-end reality" defined by System Analysts; for simpler features, it means taking full ownership of requirement gathering and logic definition. Success is defined by the elimination of logic gaps, the technical accuracy of UI specs, and a seamless knowledge transfer that ensures features are buildable and testable.

Job Duties and Responsibilities

Adaptive Requirement Ownership: Lead the gathering and clarification of product and UI requirements with stakeholders. For complex features, interpret technical documentation (APIs, flows) from System Analysts to ensure UI designs are both user-centric and technically feasible.

UI Functional Documentation: Create and maintain the "Source of Truth" (UI Design Documents) that describes the interface logic—defining button behaviors, state changes, and branching logic.

Data-to-UI Mapping: For features with backend integrations, document how data points from API responses map to specific UI elements, including handling different data types and validation states.

Edge Case Identification: Proactively identify and document missing states (loading, empty, error, or success) and "what-if" scenarios that visual designs or technical flows may not explicitly detail.

Label & Message Standardization: Maintain high UI standards by ensuring total consistency and clarity of software UI elements, including system messages and error notifications that align with both the user experience and technical requirements.

Collaborative Logic Mapping: Partner with Product Designers to ensure the intended user flow is intuitive and with System Analysts (when involved) to ensure the UI supports the required technical sequence.

Design QA & Functional Verification: Act as a functional QA to verify that final builds and UI samples align perfectly with both the documented UI logic and the original requirements/specifications.

Knowledge Transfer: Provide clarifications and walkthroughs of documented designs to management, engineering, and QA teams to minimize development friction and community cycles.

Requirements & Qualifications

Experience & Education: 3-6 years of experience in Product Analysis, Business Analysis, or Technical Writing in a software environment. A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Systems, Business, or a related field is preferred.

Technical Interpretation: Proven ability to read and interpret complex technical documentation, including API specifications, JSON structures, and system architecture flows provided by System Analysts.

Systems Thinking: The ability to analyze how a UI change impacts the broader application ecosystem and corresponds to existing backend data structures and dependencies.

Precision Technical Writing: Mastery in writing concise, "developer-ready" functional specifications that eliminate ambiguity and reduce follow-up questions from Engineering and QA.

Logic & Specification Skills: Exceptional ability to deconstruct complex user journeys into granular, "if-then-else" functional behaviors.

Stakeholder Management: Strong communication skills with the ability to lead requirement-gathering sessions with both non-technical business stakeholders and technical teams.

Tool Proficiency: Experience with documentation and collaboration tools (e.g., Confluence, Jira) and familiarity with design tools (e.g., Figma) for reviewing and annotating UI components.

Analytical Mindset: A "detective" approach to software—naturally inclined to uncover edge cases, potential errors, and inconsistencies in user flows.

title: Senior Product Analyst

content:
Join a Company That Invests in You

Seeking Alpha is the world's leading community of engaged investors. We’re the go-to destination for investors looking for actionable stock market opinions, real-time market analysis, and unique financial insights. At the same time, we’re also dedicated to creating a workplace where our team thrives. We’re passionate about fostering a flexible, balanced environment with remote work options and an array of perks that make a real difference.

What We're Looking For

Do you look at websites and think about how they might be personalized? Do you use websites and apps and think about how their features have been designed to be best for a lot of different users? Do you read articles with statistics and think about how they may be misinterpreting the data to get their results? If these things describe you, and if you’re great at SQL and have experience analyzing website data, you’re someone we want to talk to.

We’re looking for a Senior Data Analyst with experience analyzing website data. Our data analyst team analyzes everything on our website, not only for their immediate use but also for how they connect to high-level company KPIs. Our Analysts analyze raw data, not only pre-aggregated data, to extract just the right information and diagnose what is happening on our site.

The role requires understanding web development and how data is gathered, analysis of site usage and a/b tests, data visualization, and how different kinds of data can be presented most clearly, and business KPIs and how they are measured.

But more than that, we’re looking for experienced analysts who can bring us new ideas about how to analyze and extract insights from website data. Our ideal candidates have measured KPIs that we haven’t measured or used new ways to explain user retention, or analyzed features of users' data that we haven’t analyzed.

The best thing about our work is that we’re part of an incredibly data-driven company. Everyone from the CEO down uses data every day. The data teams are involved in every single thing the company does.

What You'll Do

Analyzing the behavior of users on our site and apps:

-Build and maintain dashboards that visualize the usage of single or multiple features and how that usage drives company KPIs.

-Answer questions about site usage or user behavior based on deeper analyses.

Analyze and track high-level KPIs such as conversion, retention, churn, recurring revenue, engagement, cross-device usage, e-mail and notification usage, and more.

Communicate with business stakeholders on analysis results, how they relate to business, and what business suggestions result from the analysis.

Run the whole data flow for site and app features, from defining KPIs, specifying data collection for development team implementation, and building and maintaining iterative versions of dashboards with both low-level and high-level views of collected data.

Split tests of product features:

-Design a test with clear success criteria

-Monitor test integrity

-Analyze results and give recommendations

-Use segmentation and clear cohort analysis to validate significant conclusions

-Conduct exploratory analysis to identify trends and opportunities

Requirements

A minimum of 5 years in a B2C website-related Data Analyst position

Strong SQL skills with experience writing complex and efficient analytical queries

Demonstrated experience with working in English directly with business stakeholders, understanding their needs, and explaining results

Understanding of website development and operations and how they connect to data gathered.

Experience with data visualization tools (Looker/Tableau/PowerBI, etc.)

Experience with report writing and technical requirements analysis, business process modeling/mapping, methodology development, and data modeling

title: Risk Operations Analyst
content:
Our Mission and Vision

At Solidgate, our mission is clear: to empower outstanding entrepreneurs to build exceptional internet companies. We exist to fuel the builders — the ones shaping the digital economy — with the financial infrastructure they deserve. To achieve that, we’re on a bold path: to become the #1 payments orchestration platform in the world.We believe the future of payments is shaped by people who think big, take ownership, and bring curiosity and drive to everything they do. That’s exactly the kind of teammates we want on board.

About the Role

We’re building the smartest, fastest and most resilient payments infra in fintech — and risk is a core part of how we win. As a Risk Operations Analyst at Solidgate, you’ll be the one keeping our engine clean, sharp and one step ahead. You’ll monitor how merchants behave, how money moves, and how risk evolves in real time — making sure we scale safely without slowing down growth.This role is hands-on and impact heavy. You’ll use data, logic and frameworks to keep portfolio exposure healthy, protect revenue, and help us make better, smarter risk decisions every day. It’s fast. It’s complex. And if you love owning the signal inside the noise — you’ll thrive here.What you’ll do

— Analyse risk signals, detect anomalies, and trigger the right actions or escalations— Monitor compliance with international payment scheme requirements— Control merchant reserves to prevent negative balances and minimise financial exposure— Manage merchant cap limits in line with the portfolio’s risk appetite— Execute and continuously improve daily operational tasks within approved risk processes

You’re a great fit if you have

— Bright mind with a background in econometrics, finance, management, international relations, mathematics, or computer science— or still studying in one of these fields.— A strong work ethic, great communication skills, and the ability to learn quickly — you get things done and pick up new skills on the go.— A strong sense of responsibility and attention to detail — precision matters in risk.— English B2+ — confident communication across teams and partners.

Nice to have — Self-starter — you can own your projects and take full responsibility for your area.— SQL & Tableau — extra points if you know your way around data.

Why Solidgate?

Fintech innovation at scale. We’re not just a PSP — we’re building a full-cycle European acquiring bank with direct access to schemes, regulators, and infrastructure.Real impact. Your work shapes how we detect, assess, and mitigate risks across thousands of live transactions every day.Autonomy & growth. You’ll own your area end to end, drive key components, and grow into a lead role — building your own team along the way.Tech that empowers. Redshift, Tableau, and our in-house Python-based monitoring and anti-fraud systems — built for performance and scale.Collaborative environment. A smart, curious team tackling complex fintech challenges together — from risk modeling to real-time decision systems.

💌 The Extras: 30+ days off, unlimited sick leave, free office meals, health coverage, and Apple gear to keep you productive. Courses, conferences, sports and wellness benefits — all designed for ideas, focus, and fun.

Tomorrow’s fintech needs your mindset. Come build it with us.

🫂 Know top talent? We’re always on the lookout. Recommend someone for our role, and if they get hired, there’s a bonus waiting for you — simple as that.

title: Data Analyst (BQ / SQL / Python)
content:
Role Summary

The Inventory & Demand Planning team is hiring a Data Analyst to scale a high-impact analytics roadmap across inventory, in-stock, supply, and forecasting. This role builds and maintains the data foundation that powers decision-making by translating business rules into reliable datasets, automating recurring KPI outputs, and supporting the ABC/XYZ + lifecycle governance framework so leaders and merchants operate from consistent, auditable numbers with minimal manual effort.

This is a hands-on analytics engineering role centered on data pipelines, automation, and metric integrity to enable planning decisions and streamline reporting/governance outputs. The analyst will partner closely with Inventory Planning leadership to implement definitions, validations, and scalable reporting.

What You’ll Work On

· Build and maintain curated BigQuery tables/views that standardize inventory, demand, availability, open POs/in-transit, backorders, and KPI feeds.

· Write clean, performant SQL that powers weekly/monthly reporting and executive dashboards.

· Automate refreshes and reduce manual effort through validations, reconciliations, exception flags, and clear documentation.

· Support ABC/XYZ roadmap execution by producing required inputs/outputs, applying multiplier logic, and keeping the classification pipeline stable and easy to audit.

· Support forecasting improvements using Python (data prep, feature engineering, back-testing, evaluation) and help operationalize outputs into cadence reporting.

· Expand datasets with additional signals where available (promo flags/types, merchandising tags, launch/NPA indicators, traffic/CVR signals, marketing calendar attributes).

· Partner with Merchandising, Marketing Ops, Finance, and BI/IT to align definitions, improve data quality, and drive adoption of standardized metrics.

How Success Will Be Measured

· KPI tables and dashboard feeds refresh reliably with minimal manual intervention.

· Faster turnaround on leadership and merchant requests with consistent, traceable metric logic.

· ABC/XYZ outputs are accurate, on-time, and easy to maintain.

· Forecast inputs improve through better data structure and added business/marketing signals.

· Documentation and change control keep datasets stable as business rules evolve.

Required Qualifications

· 3–5 years in analytics/data roles (retail/e-commerce strongly preferred).

· Strong SQL and hands-on experience with BigQuery (or similar cloud warehouse).

· Working Python proficiency for analysis/automation (pandas/NumPy).

· Experience supporting BI dashboards and recurring reporting.

· Demonstrated ability to validate and reconcile metrics across sources, troubleshoot discrepancies, and document logic clearly.

· Strong problem-solving, attention to detail, and clear communication with business stakeholders.

Preferred Qualifications

· Familiarity with ML/forecasting workflows (feature engineering, evaluation, operationalizing outputs) to support forecasting and driver-based models in partnership with the team.

· Familiarity with Looker/LookML (or similar semantic layers).

· Exposure to dbt and/or orchestration tools (Airflow/Composer or equivalents).

· Comfort with inventory/planning concepts (WOS, aging, availability, lost demand, backorders) and classification/ranking approaches (ABC/XYZ, PFEP).

· Version control (Git) and basic engineering hygiene (testing, documentation, change logs).

Tools / Environment

BigQuery, SQL, Python, Looker, Jira/Confluence (or equivalent), Google Cloud tooling as applicable.

title: VIP Analyst
content:
We are looking for a data-driven VIP Analyst to strengthen our VIP and High-Value Player strategy across Casino and Sportsbook verticals. In this role, you will own VIP performance analytics, bonus efficiency evaluation, behavioral segmentation, and manager impact measurement across multiple brands and geographies.

You will play a key role in maximizing VIP lifetime value (LTV), optimizing bonus ROI, and detecting early churn or risk signals within high-value cohorts.

HOW YOU WILL MAKE AN IMPACT

1. VIP & High-Value Player Analytics

Build and maintain a unified VIP analytics framework across Casino and Sportsbook products.

Develop behavioral segmentation models based on betting activity, frequency, stake size, product mix, payment behavior, and engagement patterns — not just deposit volume.

Conduct cross-brand and geo analysis (Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3 markets).

Analyze VIP lifecycle: acquisition → activation → growth → retention → churn.

Monitor and optimize key metrics: GGR, NGR, ARPU, LTV, Hold %, Bet Frequency, Average Stake.

2. Bonus ROI & Offer Optimization

Measure ROI of VIP bonuses, free bets, cashback, reloads, and personalized offers.

Analyze uplift impact on GGR, NGR, retention, and wagering behavior.

Lead A/B testing of VIP promotions and incentive mechanics.

Identify bonus abuse patterns and inefficient incentive structures.

Ensure bonus cost aligns with profitability and margin targets.

3. VIP Manager Performance & Contact Strategy

Evaluate impact of VIP manager contact rate on player retention, GGR, and NGR.

Measure player performance before and after VIP assignment.

Build KPI frameworks for VIP managers (retention rate, reactivation rate, revenue uplift, churn prevention).

Optimize segmentation rules for VIP flows and assignment logic.

Support data-driven decision-making for VIP team leads.

4. Risk, Fraud & Early Churn Detection

Detect abnormal deposit and betting patterns (spikes, sharp betting behavior, bonus abuse).

Identify early churn signals (decline in bet frequency, reduced stake size, inactivity trends).

Collaborate with Risk & Fraud teams to monitor suspicious VIP behavior.

Build automated alerts for high-risk or high-opportunity VIP accounts.

Support responsible gaming monitoring within VIP cohorts.

5. Reporting & Data Infrastructure

Own daily, weekly, and monthly VIP performance reporting.

Deliver individual VIP dashboards to support personalized account management.

Ensure consistency of VIP tagging, segmentation logic, and reporting across brands.

Automate reporting processes and improve analytics infrastructure.

Maintain transparency of GGR vs NGR impact in reporting.

6. Experiments & Product Impact

Take analytical ownership of experiments related to payments, withdrawals, limits, VIP flows, CRM mechanics, and loyalty programs.

Evaluate impact of operational changes on betting activity and VIP profitability.

Translate analytical findings into clear business recommendations with financial implications.

Partner with Product, CRM, Payments, and Risk teams.

WHAT WILL HELP YOU SUCCEED IN THE ROLE

2+ years of experience in iGaming (Casino / Sportsbook) analytics.

Strong SQL skills (experience working with large transactional betting datasets).

Solid understanding of GGR, NGR, Hold %, LTV, churn rate, bonus cost mechanics.

Experience with BI tools (Power BI / Tableau / Looker).

Experience with A/B testing and experiment evaluation.

Strong business mindset and ability to communicate insights to non-technical stakeholders.

Nice to Have

Experience with churn prediction or behavioral modeling.

Knowledge of sharp betting detection and bonus abuse patterns.

Experience with Python (Pandas, statistical analysis).

Familiarity with regulatory requirements across Tier 1 markets.

WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT HERE:

Flexible working hours and a remote work setup, so you can plan work around your life and not your life around work!

Vacation days and paid sick leave—because your rest matters.

A competitive compensation that truly reflects your skills and expertise.

Employee referral bonus and gifts to celebrate your special occasions.

50% financial support for learning expenses to supercharge your professional growth!

A positive atmosphere where you always feel respected and truly belong.

Inspirational team-building activities that turn colleagues into best friends.

Wellness benefits: We’ll support your sports passions, from yoga classes to gym memberships.

title: Senior Data Analyst for Payment Team
content:
GR8 Tech builds B2B iGaming platforms for operators who play to lead.

We deliver full-cycle, high-impact tech designed to scale — from seamless integrations and expert consulting to long-term operational support. Our platform powers millions of active players and drives real business growth. Call it what it is: the iGaming Platform for Champions.

With 1000+ GR8 people across locations and time zones, we don’t just ship technology — we help operators build success stories across brands, markets, and geos.

Our ambition drives us. Our people make it real.

If you’re a challenger in spirit and a champion in action — join us.

Why this role exists:Payments sit at the heart of our product and revenue. This role exists to turn payment data into decisions that improve conversion, reliability, and business outcomes.You’ll help us scale and optimize our payments ecosystem by owning analytics across deposits, withdrawals, PSP performance, and payment experiments — from problem framing to stakeholder-ready insights.

What you’ll drive:

Strategy & outcomes— Own core Payments KPIs and ensure metric consistency across teams (single source of truth).— Identify the biggest levers in deposit and withdrawal funnels and quantify their business impact.— Translate payment performance signals into clear priorities and recommendations.

Discovery & decisions— Partner with Payments Product Managers to shape hypotheses, define success criteria, and select the right metrics and guardrails.— Run deep-dive analyses on approval rates, decline reasons, PSP performance, and payment method mix.— Evaluate trade-offs between conversion, revenue, and risk using data-backed narratives.

Delivery & execution— Analyze payment experiments and changes (A/B tests, phased rollouts, pre/post analysis).— Build reliable analytical datasets and marts using advanced SQL.— Deliver clear, decision-ready insights with expected impact — not just charts.

BI & self-service— Lead Payments BI development in Tableau: dashboards, reporting layers, and definitions.— Enable self-service analytics for product and payments stakeholders.— Maintain data quality and trust in reporting.

Stakeholder partnership— Work closely with Payments, Product, Risk, and Operations teams.— Communicate complex findings in a simple, structured way — tailored to the audience.— Be the go-to analytics partner for payments-related questions and decisions.

What makes you a GR8 Fit:

Must-have— 4+ years of experience as a Data or Product Analyst in a product environment (payments or fintech strongly preferred).— Advanced SQL (complex joins, window functions, performance optimization, analytical datasets).— Strong understanding of payments metrics and drivers: approval and success rates, decline reasons, funnels, PSP performance, chargebacks, refunds.— Proven experience partnering with Product and Payments stakeholders end-to-end (hypotheses → metrics → insights → decisions).— Strong BI skills (Tableau preferred) and experience building scalable dashboards.— Confident Excel / Google Sheets skills (models, scenarios, structured reporting).— Solid grounding in statistics and experimentation (significance, bias, segmentation).— English: Upper-Intermediate+ (spoken and written).

Nice-to-have— Hands-on experience with A/B testing and experiment governance.— Python for analysis or automation (pandas, numpy, matplotlib / plotly).— Experience working with high-volume transactional data.

Why you’ll love working here:

Benefits Cafeteria — annual budget you allocate to:Sports • Medical • Mental health • Home office • Languages.

Work-life & support— Paid maternity/paternity leave + monthly childcare allowance.— 20+ vacation days, unlimited sick leave, emergency time off.— Remote-first + tech support + coworking compensation.— Team events (online/offline/offsite).— Learning culture with internal courses + growth programs.

Our culture & core values:GR8 Tech culture is how we win — through trust, ownership, and a growth mindset. We move fast, stay curious, and keep it real, with open feedback, room to experiment, and a team that’s got your back.

FUELLED BY TRUST: we’re open, honest, and have each other’s backs.OWN YOUR GAME: we take initiative and own what we do.ACCELER8: we move fast, focus smart, and keep it simple.CHALLENGE ACCEPTED: we grow through challenges and stay curious.BULLETPROOF: we’re resilient, ready, and always have a plan.

Work with marketing data across iOS, Android, and Web platforms of a product used by millions of users worldwide.

Supporting initiatives that help Ukraine. Find out more about our projects here.

title: Business analyst
content:
Come Back Agency supports US software and technology companies by running their hiring process. We work with delivery and leadership teams to define roles, screen candidates, and manage interviews. Successful candidates are hired directly by the company and become part of its team.

This position is with a US-based software company providing custom development and AI implementation for North American clients. The team builds and maintains production software, including AI-enabled systems, and works in long-term client engagements. Team members operate as part of an internal, distributed team and collaborate directly with client stakeholders.

*Advanced English is required. You must be able to communicate clearly in English with the US team in writing and on calls, explain your analysis, and defend recommendations

About the role:

This is not a client-facing role. You will analyze our numbers, benchmark competitors, and turn insights into weekly actions. Your goal is to help us get more qualified leads, improve conversion rates, and increase profit per project.

What you will do

Marketing and competitor intelligence

Track where competitors get leads and what channels they invest in, including Clutch, LinkedIn, SEO, paid ads, communities, partnerships, and marketplaces

Analyze competitor positioning, offers, pricing signals, case studies, and landing page patterns

Build a competitor dashboard and update it weekly or biweekly with changes, new campaigns, and new content

Recommend practical experiments we can run based on competitor patterns and gaps

Lead and pipeline analytics

Create a single view of leads across website, PPC, LinkedIn, referrals, and outbound

Report weekly on lead volume, lead quality, response time, booked calls, proposals sent, close rate, and cycle length

Identify bottlenecks and propose fixes, like targeting changes, offer changes, follow up sequences, and landing page improvements

Work with the team to keep tracking clean, including UTMs and source attribution

Profitability and delivery analytics

Analyze project profitability by client, service line, tech stack, team mix, and project type

Track margin, burn vs budget, change requests, rework signals, and delivery risk patterns

Recommend how to price and package projects to protect margin, including phased scopes and standard inclusions and exclusions

Build a simple monthly profitability report leadership can use to make decisions fast

Reporting and decision support

Turn messy data into clean data, define standard fields, and maintain the reporting system

Requirements

Strong analytical experience in a growth, strategy, ops, or finance analytics role

Excellent spreadsheet skills and comfort working with imperfect data

Ability to research competitors and synthesize insights into clear actions

Comfort with marketing metrics and basic sales funnel math

Strong written communication, concise and clear

Nice to have

Experience with B2B services, agencies, or software consulting

Experience with tools like GA4, Looker Studio, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Airtable, Notion, or similar

What We Offer:

Working hours aligned with US time zones, typically 16:00—23:59 Kyiv time.

English lessons to support clear and confident communication.

Paid vacation and sick days.

Fully remote work.

Opportunities for professional growth within the team.

Structured, personalized onboarding to help you ramp up effectively.

Apply with your resume and a short note outlining your relevant experience. You can also submit it through our website at comeback.ua. Selected candidates will be contacted by Come Back Agency

title: Junior Risk and AML Specialist
content:
We are looking for a Junior Risk & AML Specialist to join our growing FinTech team.

This role focuses on monitoring transactions, reviewing payer activities, and ensuring that all operations remain compliant with internal policies and AML regulations. You will work across multiple systems, maintaining accuracy and consistency in reviews while supporting the company’s overall risk management framework.

Requirements

Experience in Risk, AML, or Compliance (preferably within FinTech or PSP) would be an advantage, but we are open to motivated candidates without prior experience.

Strong analytical mindset and ability to identify key details in large data sets.

High level of concentration and consistency when working with repetitive or high-volume tasks.

Structured and process-driven approach to ensure accuracy in every review.

Reliability and responsibility when handling sensitive information.

Curiosity and genuine interest in understanding payer behaviour and transaction patterns.

Responsibilities

Monitor transactions and payer activities to detect suspicious behaviour, fraud attempts, and potential money laundering schemes.

Ensure compliance with applicable Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Counter-Terrorist Financing (CTF) laws, regulations, and internal standards.

Conduct AML/CFT risk assessments and identify areas of increased risk exposure.

Perform investigations into potential AML/CFT breaches or other financial crime risks.

Conduct CDD and EDD checks on payers, including SOF/SOW verification when required.

Escalate high-risk cases, red flags, or unusual activity to the Team Lead for further review.

Suggest improvements and contribute to the enhancement of internal compliance controls and procedures.

Collaborate with Legal, Operations, Payments, and Compliance teams to ensure consistent risk management.

Stay informed about regulatory updates, best practices, and emerging AML/CFT risk trends.

Maintain clear, accurate, and up-to-date records of reviews, investigations, and compliance actions.

Nice to have

Experience in Risk, Compliance, Fraud Prevention, or Customer Support.

Basic understanding of online payments or how FinTech companies operate.

Familiarity with AML tools or transaction monitoring systems.

Confident use of Excel or similar tools for data review and analysis.

Interest in compliance and analytical work.

Ability to stay focused when working with detailed or repetitive tasks.

Curiosity to understand payer behaviour and transaction patterns.

Willingness to learn, ask questions, and grow through feedback.

What you will get with us

Team-oriented and encouraging work environment.

Career development opportunity.

Paid vacation & sick leaves.

Corporate English classes.

Paying taxes and conducting private entrepreneurs.

Internal Referral program.

Remote-based work.

Hiring process:

CV screening→ Interview with Recruitment Specialist →Test → Interview with Hiring Manager → Job Offer.

Are you ready to explore new opportunities? We invite you to submit your application today. We appreciate your interest and look forward to welcoming you on board!

title: Product Analyst (with experience in ML/Data Science, AI-projects)
content:
About The Role

In this role, you will drive tangible business impact by delivering high-quality insights and recommendations, leveraging your ability to combine strategic thinking and problem-solving with detailed analysis. You will collaborate closely with Product Managers and cross-functional teams, uncovering business insights, devising optimization strategies, and validating them through experiments.

What You’ll Do

Collaborate with Product and Analytics leadership to structure and perform deep-dive analyses, delivering actionable insights into key business areas

Analyze large datasets (internal and external) to identify growth and optimization opportunities, translating findings into business recommendations and effectively communicating them to stakeholders, including senior leadership.

Perform Descriptive and Prescriptive Analytics using ML models, A/B and MAB experimentation, while building reports to understand business trends

Track and implement business metrics to drive continuous improvement and support data-driven decision-making

Act as a lead analyst, gaining deep insights into the JustAnswer audience to inform strategic decisions.

What We’re Looking For

5+ years of experience (preferably within e-commerce or customer experience products).

Strong proficiency in Excel for analysis and business modeling

Experience with SQL with a strong ability to write complex queries to extract information and arrive at an answer

Experience with Google Analytics, BigQuery, PowerBI, Python/R, and ML is desirable.

Expertise in Descriptive and Inferential Statistical Analysis, A/B testing, or Hypothesis Testing, with proven ability to analyze results.

Excellent communication skills, with confidence in interacting across all levels of management and diverse business functions.

English proficiency (at least strong upper-intermediate level).

title: Data Analyst
content:
Role overview

We are looking for a Data Analyst who will contribute to building the analytical logic of the product and work with large-scale, socially structured datasets.

This role goes beyond traditional reporting analytics. The focus is on exploratory analysis, structuring complex data, identifying meaningful signals, and contributing to the logic behind search and matching mechanisms.

Key responsibilities

Perform exploratory analysis of large datasets to identify patterns and signals affecting result quality and relevance.

Design and maintain controlled vocabularies (skills, titles, industries, locations, etc.).

Normalize and structure unorganized and semi-structured data.

Build and maintain hierarchies, classifications, and logical relationships between entities.

Contribute to the analytical logic behind search and matching mechanisms.

Formulate and validate hypotheses using data-driven approaches.

Evaluate the impact of different data signals on outcomes.

Visualize and communicate analytical findings to support product decisions.

Work closely with founders and the product team.

Required technical skills

3+ years of experience as a Data Analyst or in a similar analytical role.

Advanced SQL proficiency: complex joins, aggregations, query optimization.

Experience with BI tools: Tableau (preferred) or Power BI BI tools are used for research and analytical exploration rather than routine dashboarding.

Strong data visualization skills.

Strong data visualization skills.

Required analytical & cognitive skills

Strong critical thinking and hypothesis-driven approach.

Ability to work with ambiguous problems without predefined solutions.

Experience working with unstructured or semi-structured data.

Ability to design hierarchies, classifications, and entity relationships.

Ability to translate business questions into analytical models.

High attention to detail and data quality.

Research-oriented mindset and proactive problem-solving approach.

Research-oriented mindset and proactive problem-solving approach.

Nice to have

Experience with Python /R for data analysis: pandas, NumPy, etc.

Experience with ETL processes and data pipelines.

Experience or familiarity with graph databases (e.g., Neo4j).

Experience working with social, network-based, or relationship-driven datasets.

title: Technical Business Analyst
content:
We help small and medium-sized ISPs, telcos, and other businesses around the world keep pace with larger Tier 1 operators and global OTT / IPTV players.

As a family-owned company, we maintain close, long-term relationships with our customers, many of whom are also independent, family-run businesses.

We believe that small businesses should have access to the same advanced technologies used by the biggest operators, so that people everywhere, no matter how remote, can enjoy the same quality of experience. We deliver these technologies through our backend platform and applications across iOS, Android, Tizen, WebOS, Web, and Roku.

The Opportunity

We are looking for a Technical Business Analyst (with a fast-track to Product Owner) to join our Product team and help shape the future of our IPTV / OTT platform used by telecom operators, hotels, and service providers worldwide.

This is a hands-on and self-driven role. You will be expected to lead the discovery phase for your area: talk to stakeholders, explore data, understand how things work end-to-end, and turn all of that into clear product decisions and requirements. Over time, we expect this role to take over a significant part of Product Ownership for one or more domains.

You will work closely with the Product Manager, development, DevOps, and QA teams, but you will be able to move forward independently and unblock yourself whenever possible.

What You Will Do

Own the discovery phase for features and initiatives: clarify the problem, explore options, and propose solutions.

Work directly with customers and internal stakeholders to collect, challenge, and refine requirements.

Analyze API payloads, XML, JSON, and text logs to understand current behavior, edge cases, and issues.

Use light scripting and tools to clean, transform, and analyze input data when needed.

Spin up and verify simple environments using Docker (and optionally Kubernetes using a GUI) to explore features or validate assumptions.

Translate business needs into detailed user stories, acceptance criteria, and supporting documentation.

Maintain a clear, prioritized backlog together with the Product Manager and gradually take ownership of product decisions in your domain.

Support the team during development and testing, answering questions and adjusting requirements as needed.

Use AI tools daily to improve quality and, in some cases, speed up research, analysis, and documentation while retaining ownership of the outcomes.

Use AI tools daily to improve quality and, in some cases, speed up research, analysis, and documentation while retaining ownership of the outcomes.

You Are Our Ideal Candidate If You Have

At least 4 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Owner in product or software companies.

Strong understanding of the product and project life cycle and experience managing requirements through all stages.

Proven ability to analyze and document requirements, write technical specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria.

Practical experience working on global projects and collaborating directly with clients.

A deep understanding of product functionality from both business and technical perspectives.

Experience with Jira and Confluence.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Upper intermediate English level or higher.

A self-sufficient working style: you are comfortable driving discovery, asking questions, digging into systems, and proposing solutions instead of waiting for detailed input.

title: Lead Product Analyst
content:
Product Analytics are at the forefront of understanding how our audiences interact with their brand, working to create richer, more personalised experiences that the audiences love.

As a Lead Product Analyst you will lead a diverse team of product analysts to produce insights that will drive digital product strategy, working closely with colleagues and stakeholders across Product, Engineering, Data Science and more.

Main responsibilities

Reporting to the Head of Product Analytics, you will:

Partner closely with Product Managers, Product Analytics and Product Teams to understand metrics requirements, translate them into actionable analytics needs, and develop dashboards and self-serve tools that empower teams to make data-informed decisions.

Grow and lead a diverse team of analysts to deliver high-quality, actionable insights, fostering an inclusive and collaborative culture where all individuals can contribute fully.

Champion data-driven decision making across the Product Group, advocating for experimentation, measurement, and insight-led product development.

Lead deep-dive analyses that inform product strategy and roadmap decisions, identifying opportunities to optimise audience experience, engagement, and impact.

Drive cross-functional collaboration and evangelise the value of data across teams, shaping and improving data analysis capabilities and self-service functionality across the organisation.

Ensure data quality, consistency, and governance by aligning metric definitions, maintaining KPI glossaries, and validating tracking accuracy across tools such as Piano and browser network analyses.

Communicate complex analytical findings through clear, visual storytelling, translating technical insights into narratives that inform and influence non-technical stakeholders.

Maintain strong documentation practices to support continuity, transparency, and the future development of front-end (FE) analytics capabilities.

Operate within agile delivery frameworks e.g. 2 week delivery with continuous refinement, and iterative development of analytics solutions.Essential

Experience leading and managing a team of data analysts, developing individuals and teams to achieve their full potential and driving value through data and insight (2+ years)

4 years of experience in an analytical role, preferably in digital products

Experience working in a fast-paced environment in order to deliver insights that can influence the direction of the business

Great communication skills and the ability to translate technical information for non-technical audiences at all levels of the organisation

Ability to think strategically and a passion for producing high-quality, accurate analytics deliverables

Ability to build and maintain strong working relationships with colleagues and stakeholders across multiple disciplines, managing expectations of senior colleagues and navigating conflicting priorities and pressures

High levels of logical thinking and problem solving skills

A keen advocate for the role of data in driving business performanceWill be a plus:

Familiarity with agile or other rapid application development methods

Understanding of data pipelines and/or data modelling

Experience with Data Science & Machine learning

Knowledge of R or Python

Experience working in a digital product focused analytical role in a customer-centric organisation

title: Senior Data Analyst
content:
We are seeking a Data Analyst (Web/Mobile Marketing Analyst) to build and scale a unified analytics foundation for our mobile and web subscription products. You will consolidate marketing, product, and financial data to provide actionable insights that drive user acquisition efficiency, improve monetization, and support strategic product decisions.

This role is ideal for an analytical professional who thrives at the intersection of marketing analytics, product data, and subscription economics, and who is comfortable working cross-functionally with UA managers, Product Managers, Data Engineers, and leadership teams.

Requirements

Experience with subscription-based mobile and web products (subscriptions, in-app purchases, web2app, web2web).

Strong SQL and Python skills.

Experience with BI tools (Looker Studio, Tableau, or similar).

Experience with subscription analytics platforms (AppHud / Adapty / RevenueCat).

Experience with attribution systems (AppsFlyer / Adjust or similar).

Experience analyzing paid traffic (Meta Ads, Google Ads, ASA, etc.): CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, LTV, CAC, payback.

Experience with analyzing product and unit economics metrics: LTV, ARPU/ARPPU, Retention, Conversion, Churn, CAC, ROI/ROAS, payback.

Understanding of DWH and data mart design principles; experience collaborating with Data Engineers (layers, keys, schemas).

Responsibilities

Analyze the performance of paid marketing channels (Meta, TikTok, Google Ads, ASA, etc.): CAC, CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, LTV by channel/country/campaign.

Evaluate the contribution of different traffic sources, creatives, and audiences to monetization and user retention.

Analyze core product metrics of mobile apps: LTV, ARPU, Retention, Conversion, Churn, and cohort-based user behavior.

Generate and validate hypotheses to improve monetization, retention, and user acquisition efficiency based on data.

Design, write, and maintain SQL queries for the DWH to support regular reporting, ad-hoc analysis, and BI dashboards.

Participate in data architecture and data mart design with Data Engineers: define required tables, relationships, metrics, and data SLAs.

Configure and develop dashboards in Looker Studio / Tableau for product, marketing, and executive teams.

Ensure data quality: monitor correctness of integrations (AppsFlyer, AppHud, ad platforms), track data lags, gaps, duplicates, and anomalies.

Collaborate with UA, PMM, Product Managers, and C-level stakeholders: help shape analytical requests, propose relevant metrics and reporting formats.

title: Business Analyst (ERP)
content:
Drive finance ERP solutions for complex, high-load digital products

Softsich is a young and ambitious international product tech company that develops scalable B2B digital platforms. We’re looking for an experienced Business Analyst (ERP Finance) to support and develop finance-related ERP workflows within complex, high-volume transactional environments.

In this role, you will work closely with finance, operations, payments, and product teams, translating business needs into clear functional requirements and supporting the development of effective ERP solutions.

Your key responsibilities will include:

Gather, document, and validate business requirements from stakeholders across finance, operations, payments, and product teams.

Be responsible for end-to-end financial workflows for high-load transactional products, including operations and finance analytics and reporting.

Define functional specifications for the Finance ERP system.

Collaborate with developers, architects, and system integrators to shape requirements, data models, and diagrams.

Lead stakeholder sessions to map business processes and identify system needs.

Document system behavior, workflows, data dictionaries, and training materials for ERP end users.

Stay informed of regulatory, tax, and operational changes that impact financial systems.

It’s a match if you have:

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Information Systems, or a related field.

3+ years of experience as a Business Analyst with a focus on ERP or finance systems.

Experience working with high-volume transactional systems.

Strong understanding of financial controls, reconciliation processes, and compliance.

Experience designing or working with ERP systems (custom or commercial).

Familiarity with Agile/Scrum environments and software product life cycles.

Upper-Intermediate level of English (written and spoken).

What we offer:

Flexible schedule and remote format or offices in Warsaw/Kyiv — you choose.

24 paid vacation days, sick leaves, and health insurance (UA-based, other locations in progress).

A supportive, friendly team where knowledge-sharing is part of the culture.

Coverage for professional events and learning.

Про компанію Softsich

title: Data Analyst
Senior Growth Analyst - Spark Team
content:
Readdle is a pioneering force in the personal productivity space on Apple devices, having shaped the landscape since 2007. Our mission is to empower individuals and teams with innovative technology, enhancing their efficiency and creativity. We are dedicated to crafting exceptional mobile and desktop experiences for those who aspire to achieve more.

As a Senior Growth Analyst at Readdle, you’ll own the numbers behind how Spark grows. From the first ad impression to long-term renewals, you’ll make sense of the data, design event structures, and ensure everything is measurable. You’ll dig into funnels, uncover insights, and build dashboards that make growth performance crystal clear for product and marketing teams.

What will you do:

Transform and analyze large datasets in BigQuery and Amplitude to uncover trends, anomalies, and actionable insights across the user journey.

Build and maintain self-serve dashboards in Tableau and Google Sheets that reduce ad-hoc reporting requests and establish a clear source-of-truth for growth metrics.

Define, document, and QA event structures for new features, campaigns, and experiments; build a robust monetization measurement system to support pricing and migration decisions.

Analyze user funnels across ads, store, onboarding, in-app usage, purchases, and cancellations to identify drop-offs and growth opportunities.

Design and monitor A/B experiments and feature launches; validate results and ensure long-term impact tracking.

Proactively surface insights, hypotheses, and growth opportunities to marketing and product teams; shape quarterly prioritization with impact scenarios to influence roadmap decisions.

Build forecasting and scenario models for installs, conversions, retention, and revenue.

Ensure data integrity across tools and pipelines through established QA processes; work with Appsflyer to track attribution and optimize acquisition reporting.

About you:

5+ years in growth, product, or marketing analytics in a B2C or SaaS environment, with experience supporting pricing, monetization, or migration initiatives in subscription-based products.

Strong SQL skills and experience with BigQuery or similar cloud data warehouses (Redshift, Snowflake); proficiency in Tableau and/or Amplitude for dashboards and complex data visualization.

Experience with Appsflyer or other attribution platforms; familiarity with Python for data analysis and automation is a strong plus.

Solid understanding of product analytics (funnels, cohorts, retention, event tracking), statistics, A/B testing, and concepts like segmentation, churn, or LTV modeling.

Proven ability to design self-serve dashboards and act as a strategic thought partner to PM/PMM teams, not just an executor of analytics requests.

Comfortable working cross-functionally with product, marketing, and engineering teams with a proactive, curious, and coachable mindset.

What you will get at Readdle:

Customer-centric culture. We put our users at the heart of everything we do. Every team member has the opportunity to engage directly with customers, gaining insights that shape meaningful, delightful experiences for millions worldwide.

Relentless growth. We’re committed to mastery in our craft. We take ownership of our work, decisions, and outcomes, and we see feedback as a catalyst for growth. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn, evolve, and raise the bar.

Exceptional people, exceptional team. Our greatest strength is our people. We care deeply about each other, work transparently, and celebrate collective success. Together, we build an environment where everyone can do their best work and grow beyond their potential.

Real impact. We design products that truly matter. Our focus is on delivering tangible value, simplifying complexity, pushing boundaries, and continuously improving how we build and deliver solutions to our users.

Culture of innovation. We embrace curiosity and creativity in everything we do. Fresh ideas are not just welcomed, they’re expected, celebrated, and turned into real innovations that shape the future of our products and company.

title: Middle Data Analyst
content:

Ми оперуємо численними проєктами у сфері iGaming на ринках України, Європи та США, інвестуємо у венчурні стартапи, перспективні ідеї та людей.Наразі ми у пошуках Middle Data Analyst, що доєднається та підсилить нашу Analytics & Insights команду.Про роль: Ми шукаємо талановитого та амбіційного Data Analyst на повний робочий день для участі в челенджових iGaming проєктах.

Що будеш робити:

Перетворювати великі масиви даних на цінні бізнес-інсайти.

Створювати та підтримувати дашборди Power BI для продукту, маркетингу та керівництва.

Аналізувати активацію, залученість та утримання користувачів, зв’язуючи метрики з доходами і зростанням.

Запускати та оцінювати A/B тести.

Автоматизувати звітність та ETL-процеси.

Працювати з інженерами, щоб дані були точними, повними та актуальними.

Проводити глибинні дослідження і підтримувати команди у складних крос-доменних задачах.

Що потрібно:

3+ років досвіду у data/product analytics (щонайменше 2 роки у корпоративному середовищі).

Впевнене володіння SQL і Python/R (pandas, numpy, matplotlib/pyplot).

Досвід роботи з BI-інструментами: Power BI, Tableau, Looker Studio.

Навички моделювання даних (DBT/Dataform) і роботи з хмарними платформами (GCP / BigQuery).

Розуміння статистики, ймовірності, A/B тестів та формування гіпотез.

Аналітичне мислення, системність, проактивність та увага до деталей.

Ми пропонуємо:

Відсутність бюрократії в процесах прийняття рішень і можливість безпосередньо впливати на продукт/проєкт;

Реалізація ідей через власні проєкти - Не бійтесь експериментувати! Пропонуйте та овнеріть процес реалізації;

Підтримуюче середовище та команда, із якою можна робити дійсно круті продукти, що змінюють ринок;

Зарплату рівня IT-/iGaming-ринку та повний соцпакет (медична страховка, консультації терапевта в офісі, компенсація спортзалу, компенсація вартості ланчів з доставкою тощо);

Зручний офіс у центрі Києва (пішки зі Звіринецької/Либідської) із зеленою панорамною терасою та без блекаутів

Відпустка — у тебе буде 17 днів оплачуваної відпустки та 3 екстравихідні — одруження, народження дитини, непередбачувані події та інше

Бонус за рекомендацію - Ми завжди радіємо та цінуємо те, що тіммейти рекомендують своїх друзів, тому до плюсів роботи з перевіреною та надійною людиною ми додаємо бонус;

Релокейт - зміна міста проживання завжди спонукає до додаткових витрат, а наш бонус допомагає пройти цей період без зайвих стресів.

title: Аналітик даних
Performance Marketing analyst
content:
Привіт!Я Рома, Head of Marketing в expla.Бачу, ти вже відкрив(ла) нашу вакансію?

Захоплення математикою й аналітикою.

Сильне бізнес мислення.

Перфекціонізм.

Системність.

Логіка та критичне мислення.

Готовність брати на себе відповідальність та дотримуватися дедлайнів.

Уміння знаходити вихід зі складних ситуацій та не опускати руки.

Самостійність у прийнятті рішень.

AI-first mindset

Якщо це все про тебе і ти бажаєш розвиватися та підкорювати Еверест у Digital Marketing — чекаю на твоє CV.Цікаво, чим саме будеш займатись у час між своїми вихідними?1) Будувати маркетингові дешборди— створювати зручні маркетинг-дашборди, які показують реальну ефективність рекламних кампаній— структурувати дані так, щоб маркетологи та керівники направленнь могли приймати рішення за секунди, а не години— автоматизувати звітність і зменшувати ручну аналітику2) Створювати систему алертівНе відправляєш своє CV, тому що не знаєш, що ми тобі запропонуємо?— розробити систему автоматичних алертів, яка миттєво сигналізує про проблеми— знаходити аномалії: падіння конверсій, просідання метрик, та різкі зміни— допомагати команді реагувати швидше і мінімізувати втрати3) Шукати неефективності— аналізувати кампанії та знаходити приховані проблеми у performance— виявляти неочевидні патерни (наприклад: погана конверсія на desktop, конкретні geo або placement)— формувати інсайти, які допомагають покращувати unit-економіку рекламних кампанійЗараз ми ТОП-1 в нашій ніші, зростаємо по прибутку х2 з року в рік. Це перша позиція в напрямку маркетингової аналітики, тому ми шукаємо людину, яка фактично побудує цей напрямок разом з нами. Тут буде багато простору для реалізації власних ідей та можливість суттєво вплинути на розвиток аналітики направлення.Цікаво, який необіхідний «стек» для роботи?— BI інструменти (Tableau / Looker / Power BI / Metabase)— SQL / Python— Performance marketing метрики (ROAS, LTV, CPM, CPA)Не відправляєш своє CV, тому що не знаєш, що ми тобі запропонуємо?

Кар’єрне зростання, як горизонтальне, так і вертикальне. Ти працюватимеш у команді професіоналів, які допоможуть твоєму розвитку й задоволенню амбіцій. До речі, 80% наших тiмлiдiв приходять до компанії джунами.

Конкурентна заробітна плата у $$$.

Офіси в Києві та Варшаві.

Можливість бронювання

Київський офіс, відкритий 24/7, знаходиться за 5 хвилин від станції метро Олімпійська. Він обладнаний генератором, супутниковим інтернетом, душем, запасом води та харчів на декілька тижнів — ми готові навіть до повного блекауту.

Нам важливо, щоб тебе нічого не могло відірвати від підкорення «Евересту» маркетингу, тому ми заберемо частину твоїх повсякденних турбот на себе і забезпечимо:— безкоштовні сніданки, обіди та перекуси в київському офісі (ти завжди зможеш поласувати смаколиками, фруктами);— 100% компенсація безлімітних лікарняних, медичне страхування: твоє здоров’я в пріоритеті;компенсація послуг психолога;— 20 днів відпустки + за кожен рік роботи у компанії кількість вихідних збільшується ще на один. Довше працюєш, більше відпочиваєш)— час для спортзалу в київському офісі протягом дня;— твій розвиток: навчання з можливістю відвідувати платні конференції, курси, семінари тощо;— твоє дозвілля: поїздки по Україні та за кордон з командою за досягнення спільних цілей після нашої Перемоги (до повномасштабного вторгнення ми побували на гірськолижці Андорри, засмагали на Шрі-Ланці, разом займалися дайвінгом в єгипетській Blue Hole). Про щорічне підкорення Карпатських гір навіть не будемо згадувати;Ми — соціально відповідальна команда: регулярно підтримуємо ЗСУ, допомагаємо притулкам для тварин і дбаємо про безпеку співробітників.Чому ми звертаємось «на ти»?Тому що в expla ми цінуємо неформальне спілкування і здорову командну культуру.Саме це допомагає нам ефективно працювати з мільйонними рекламними бюджетами.Якщо хочеш почати кар’єру в performance-маркетингу через практику — надсилай CV. Будемо раді бачити тебе в команді 🚀

title: Marketing Analyst
content:
Kiss My Apps — компанія-платформа, що об’єднує 7 продуктових вертикалей та 30+ AI-first продуктів, 100+ мільйонів користувачів, власну екосистему аналітичних, пеймент та маркетингових розробок.

Продукти KMA це світові лідери в нішах utilities, lifestyle, health&fitness — AI Remodel, Printer, Botan, Calorie Counter і не тільки. Це продукти, що займають топ-1 місця App Store й вирішують потреби комʼюніті з сотень мільйонів людей.

Наш темп — це наш competitive advantage. KMA зростає мінімум х3 рік до року — і ми шукаємо Data Analyst (with engineering part), того/ту, хто допоможе масштабуватись ще швидше.

Коротко про роль:Маркетинг — один із ключових драйверів росту Kiss My Apps, а аналітика є основою прийняття рішень. Ми шукаємо Marketing Analyst, який візьме на себе відповідальність за розвиток маркетингової аналітики: від безпосередньої роботи з даними до побудови процесів і взаємодії з бізнесом.

Твої задачі:

Розвиток і підтримка маркетингової аналітики для B2C web/mobile продуктів.

Управління та розвиток команди маркетингових аналітиків (планування задач, пріоритизація, ревʼю, менторство).

Побудова та вдосконалення аналітичних процесів.

Тісна взаємодія із стейкхолдерами, залученість у формуванні гіпотез, дослідженнях ефективності маркетингових рішень й ініціатив.

Hands-on аналітична робота: розбудова BI та автоматизацій, проведення досліджень, формування інсайтів;

Контроль якості даних та аналітичних результатів у маркетинговому домені.

Контроль якості даних та аналітичних результатів у маркетинговому домені.

Що очікуємо від тебе:

Досвід у маркетинговій аналітиці від 2 років.

Впевнене володіння SQL та BI-інструментами.

Знання математики та статистики.

Знання математики та статистики.

Буде плюсом:

Досвід менеджменту команди.

Python для обробки даних та автоматизацій.

Досвід з Tableau.

Досвід роботи з Databricks + dbt.

Тобі до нас, якщо шукаєш:

Роботу на вістрі технологій із фокусом на сучасний стек.

Культуру відкритості: open-minded керівник, відсутність бюрократії та вітання ініціатив.

Ми пропонуємо:

Формат роботи на твій вибір: fully remote з будь-якої точки вільного світу, а також доступ до одного з наших офісів за бажанням (Київ, Варшава).

Умови, завдяки яким ти можеш сфокусуватись на перформансі: гідна винагорода, що відповідає твоїм скілам та досвіду. А також ми забезпечуємо технікою незалежно від формату роботи та географії.

Кар’єрне зростання через дію: 80%+ усіх leads в Kiss My Apps ще 2-3 роки тому були світчерами. Твій вплив тут не визначається роками в резюме — він визначається тим, як швидко ти навчаєшся, береш відповідальність та береш оунершіп за власну карʼєру.

Командні активності: Для підтримки ментального здоров’я нашої команди ми пропонуємо онлайн-заняття йогою двічі на тиждень.

Розвиток та професійна реалізація: проводимо внутрішні speaking clubs англійською з нейтів спікером, а також надаємо можливість виступати на внутрішніх та зовнішніх івентах від Kiss My Apps. Крім цього ти матимеш річний бюджет на покриття до 50% професійних конференцій, освітніх подій та івентів.

Додаткові бенефіти, де ти обираєш: надаємо фіксований бюджет на рік з якого ти сам обираєш, яку статтю витрат покрити: 50% від медстрахування, психотерапії, спорту чи стоматології. А також 40 днів оплачуваного відпочинку та лікарняних без привʼязки до дат.

Опора в умовах війни: забезпечуємо кожного всім необхідним для безперебійної роботи, системно підтримуємо Сили Оборони та долучаємось до ініціатив із відновлення України.

Важливо: є опція бронювання для військовозобов’язаних після випробувального терміну, за умови наявності належно оформлених військово-облікових документів та внутрішніх можливостей компанії, визначених відповідно до вимог чинного законодавства.
